summary.intent: The user attempted to resume a previous development session that involved work across multiple packages (core indexer, VSCode extension, and server components).
summary.outcome: Nothing was resumed — no active tasks existed in the new conversation context. The session ended with uncommitted changes identified but no work performed.

repo: Project has a monorepo structure with packages/core, packages/vscode, and a root src/ directory
VSCode extension has a bundled server (packages/vscode/bundled-server/serve.js) separate from the main server (src/serve.ts)

code.finding: Had uncommitted changes — likely part of the previous session's work
Had uncommitted changes — checkpoint/session UI work in progress
Had uncommitted changes — session detail panel work in progress alongside CheckpointTreeProvider

workflow: Claude Code task state does not persist across conversations — 'resume' only works within the same session
Uncommitted changes survive session boundaries but task/todo context does not

friction: Task state lost between conversations — user expected session continuity that doesn't exist across conversation boundaries
open_items: Uncommitted changes in packages/core/src/indexer.ts need to be committed or stashed
In-progress VSCode extension work (CheckpointTreeProvider, SessionDetailPanel) left uncommitted
Server-side changes in src/serve.ts and src/server.ts left uncommitted
